features.name: package declaration with localparam
features.description: Code should include a package declaration containing a localparam constant definition

features.name: wildcard package import in module body
features.description: Code should include a wildcard package import statement (import pkgname::*;) placed in the module body

features.name: module port list import declaration
features.description: Code should include a module with import statement in the port list area (module name import params; ports)
